programme.desc: Discovering picturesque scenery from the unique Îles de la Madeleine.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Earth From Above
programme.desc: Traveling the world with a birds-eye-view perspective of scenic wonders.

programme.title: Nature's Beauty: World of Relaxation
programme.desc: Scenes from over 100 different exotic, natural destinations around the world; a seamless, graciously flowing mix of several Nature Relaxation shorter length productions, designed to keep you in a state of complete relaxation from start to finish; transitioning you from golden sunsets to snowy mountaintops; from hidden canyon waterfalls to tropical islands so pure you've likely never seen anything like it!

programme.title: Whiritoa Beach, New Zealand
programme.desc: Discover the raw beauty of this secluded New Zealand beach, surrounded by wildflowers.

programme.title: Flying Over the Atlantic Ocean
programme.desc: Travelling the coasts of the Atlantic Ocean from a bird's-eye view.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: SereneScapes
programme.desc: Feeling the wondrous expanse of a spectacular desert surrounded by towering mountain peaks.

programme.title: Ninety Mile Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: The almost never-ending paradise of one of New Zealand's most breathtaking beaches.

programme.title: Wells Gray Falls
programme.desc: A peaceful soundtrack with a waterfall tumbling over the edge of a cliff.

programme.title: Benang Kelambu & Stokel: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experience a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Wharariki Beach I: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring the sandy shores and rocky cliffs of a majestic beach in New Zealand.

programme.title: Sparking Patagonia Waves
programme.desc: A cool, refreshing window to the glacial lakeshore of Patagonia's Torres Del Paine National Park, in Chile, all without having to fly 20+ hours, then backpack 20+ miles.

programme.title: Spirit Lake Relaxation
programme.desc: Relax for 3 hours at the gorgeous Spirit Lake, in Mount St Helen's Washington with this soothing dynamic nature film containing only the pure sounds of Nature!

programme.title: Tarawera Lake & Taupo: New Zealand
programme.desc: Various nature scenery videos.

programme.title: Above the Tulip Fields
programme.desc: Tulip fields as seen from a drone perspective in the windmill-filled country of Holland.

programme.title: Beachside Hut: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Golden sand, crystal-clear waters, infinite blue sky, and a charming hut on the Dominican Republic's Playa Coson.

programme.title: Beautiful Kauai: Hawaii
programme.desc: Kauai's natural beauty.

programme.title: Nacpan Beach
programme.desc: Travelling to a beautiful stretch of cream-colored sand with swaying coconut palms and clear waters.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: New Zealand Gardens
programme.desc: The filmmaker explores the breath-taking gardens of New Zealand and provides the diversity and beauty of these enchanting havens.

programme.title: Ulun Danu Temple: Indonesia
programme.desc: Feel the tranquility of an ancient temple and the serene views of its surrounding waters.

programme.title: Rugged Coast: Newfoundland
programme.desc: The solidarity peacefulness of the Fort Point lighthouse on Newfoundland and Labrador's rugged coast.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: An aerial journey to the remote fjords and valleys of eastern Iceland.

programme.title: Abel Tasman National Park
programme.desc: The lush coastal native bush of the Abel Tasman National Park in New Zealand.

programme.title: Tumpak Sewu Waterfalls: East Java
programme.desc: A close look at the edge of the tiered, plunging streams of Indonesia's Tumpak Sewu falls.

programme.title: Fly Over Kelingking Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's eye view of a scenic beach surrounded by pristine waters and high cliffs.

programme.title: Pancake Rocks: New Zealand
programme.desc: New Zealand's Pancake Rocks offer a mesmerizing combination of geology, natural beauty, and coastal splendor, with intricate rock patterns and shapes formed over millions of years of wind and water exposure.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Glacial Beauty: Newfoundland
programme.desc: Admiring the quiet and glacial beauty of icebergs drifting across the bay at Newfoundland's Amherst Cove.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: Nusa Penida: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's eye view of Nusa Penida.

programme.title: Wildlife Wonders of South America
programme.desc: A sunrise at Salar de Uyuni in Bolivia with flamingo and llama scenes from high altitude volcanic salt lakes; welcoming new life in the Chilean landscapes of San Pedro Atacama; the Torres del Paine National Park in Patagonia.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Lazing the day away on a white sand beach in the Philippines as the sun gently sets on the horizon.

programme.title: Spectacular Setting Sun
programme.desc: The sun sets as it sinks behind the mountains of the Laurentians, Quebec.

programme.title: Sunset Sierra Creek
programme.desc: A golden window to the Sierra mountains.

programme.title: Thermal Wonderland: New Zealand
programme.desc: Free from rabbit holes but still full of magic, Waiotapu Thermal Wonderland has an impressive geothermal landscape.

programme.title: America From Above
programme.desc: Part one of a new series of ambient drone films for relaxation, America From Above is a spectacular yet ultra-soothing 1-hour long natural journey that sweeps viewers gently above America's vistas. You'll begin the farmlands of Iowa, soaring west through the Rocky Mountains of Colorado, then on to Utah's iconic red rock landscapes and finally ending on the West Coast with a familiar voyage over Big Sur and then back to San Diego just in time for sunset.

programme.title: Boardwalk to the Beach: Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Strolling on the boardwalk to the turquoise waters in Le Gosier, Guadeloupe.

programme.title: Breezy Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Discovering the dazzling sapphire waters on the Dominican Republic's Playa Las Galeras.

programme.title: Return to Paradise 1
programme.desc: Featuring the hidden exotic Fijian island of Nanuku, a tiny, palm-covered, sandy atoll surrounded by lagoons brimming with sea life; some aerial drone clips give perspective from above.

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast
programme.desc: An ambient nature film features the spectacular sights and sounds of the legendary 11-mile Kalalau Trail on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.

programme.title: North Island's Waterfalls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The North Island region of New Zealand is home to several stunning waterfalls, from tall streams that snake over towering cliffsides to short yet wide plunges of cascading waters.

programme.title: Tropical Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: A view of Playa Madama, an unspoiled beach framed by high bluffs at the edge of the Dominican Republic.

programme.title: Outdoor Fire
programme.desc: A cozy outdoor fire with breathtaking views of a snowy lake and forest.

programme.title: Fly Over Kauai, Hawaii
programme.desc: Experiencing Hawaii from above in a spectacular flight over stunning coastlines and lush landscapes.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: East Bali
programme.desc: A serene soundtrack amidst a journey to spectacular beaches in Bali.

programme.title: Tutoko River: New Zealand
programme.desc: Rushing waters through rocky rapids.

programme.title: Fly Over Paradise: Philippines
programme.desc: A journey to discover tropical beaches.

programme.title: Island of Maui, Hawaii, U.S.
programme.desc: The beauty and exotic charm of the Lahaina marina located on the Hawaiian island of Maui.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise
programme.desc: Dive into an undersea world inhabited by the sea turtles; featuring real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for relaxation.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Oahu Morning Waves
programme.desc: Relaxing on the shores of Oahu, Hawaii just after sunrise, where big blue waves crash in golden sunlight, perfect as a backdrop for meditation, yoga, relaxing, reading, or just as an idyllic flowing screensaver.

programme.title: Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: The calming effects of snow as it blankets roads, forests, and mountains in preparation for winter.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Estonia Tallinn
programme.desc: Despite the boom of the 21st century development, Tallinn, the 1000-year-old capital of Estonia, safeguards its UNESCO-listed medieval Old Town, one of Europe’s most complete walled cities. Marco Biagioli and Erica Melargo, a famous Italian nomad couple, lose themselves in its fairy-tale charms, and find out its legends. They also visit iconic attractions such as Alexander Nevsky Cathedral and Raeapteek, the oldest pharmacy in Europe that has continuously been in business in the same building.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xp Guide Seychelles (ENG)
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in the Seychelles, Freishia finds out that every island has something unique to offer.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Backpack Tel Aviv, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Israel and first explores Sarona, including its local market, and tries local food and wine. Her next stop is Jaffa exploring its flea market ending with Shakshuka Shushka.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Czech Republic Kutna Hora
programme.desc: The ancient silver mining town of Kutná Hora was the second most important town in the medieval Kingdom of Bohemia after Prague. Rohan Patoley learns about the erstwhile glories of the town at the former royal mint, the Italian court, and soaks in the romance of the quaint winery, Vinné Sklepy. He also attends the Royal Silvering Festival, an annual Gothic celebration recalling the town’s rich past.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Timeless Tamil Nadu Chennai, India
programme.desc: Alex is introduced to Tamil Nadu through the state capital, Chennai. A colonial-era cathedral that she visits turns out to be one of the only three known churches in the world built over the tomb of an apostle of Jesus. She also finds out that a museum dedicated to the life of a saint was once used by an American businessman to store ice. She soon realizes that the city is full of hidden stories waiting to be explored.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Quest Kolkata 3, India
programme.desc: The pillowy goodness of Bengali sweets is even more famous in India than some of Kolkata’s landmarks. Alex, however, sets out to discover the forgotten sweets of Bengal. She meets some veteran sweet shop owners in the city, who show her how to make some lesser-known traditional sweets.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Estonia Aidu
programme.desc: Tallinn, Estonia’s capital, is known for its quaint, medieval Old Town but Italian nomad couple, Marco and Erica discover other sides to the city by visiting offbeat attractions such as the Seaplane Harbour Museum and Telliskivi Creative City, a hub of artists. They also tuck into a medieval feast at Olde Hansa Inn. Following this, they have an off-roading adventure at Aidu oil shale quarry.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 Xp Guide Singapore 1
programme.desc: Considering Singapore’s reputation as a glitzy, fast-paced, ultra-urbanized city, Sukhmani is surprised at the pockets of nature it offers.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Backpack Caesarea, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Zodiac fountain and then Jaffa Port. She then explores National Park in Caesarea. Ending the episode as learns about Baha'i faith.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Czech Republic Pilsen
programme.desc: Pilsen boasts of a majestic Baroque town square and magnificent Gothic churches but to the world, it will always be known as the birthplace of the world’s first and arguably best lager beer, Pilsner Urquell. Rohan Patoley takes the tour of the most famous brewery at the town that has been practicing the art of brewing beer over 700 years.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Timeless Tamil Nadu Mahabalipuram, India
programme.desc: In the 8th century AD, a town on the Coromandel coast became a lab for the kings of the Pallava dynasty to conduct their architectural experiments. Centuries later, Alex visits the world-famous rock-cut temples and cave shrines of Mahabalipuram to explore the styles of architecture that were innovated by kings, who are often called the pioneers of South Indian architecture.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Quest Naila 1, India
programme.desc: Khad Maas is a celebrated Rajasthani dish with war-time origins. Game meat used to be slow-cooked in underground pits created to ensure that the fire could not be seen by enemy troops. Due to its intricate and cumbersome preparation, the dish seldom graces tables in Rajasthan today. Alex learns how to prepare this with the cultural conservationist, Trivikram.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Estonia Narva
programme.desc: Marco and Erica get to know about the dark history of Estonia while exploring the remains of Narva, the country’s third largest city at its easternmost limit. From the fortress of Narva and the bastions of Narva to an abandoned textile mill, everything tells them about the intriguing story of the town. They also learn about the Russian and ‘alien’ people living here.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E51 Xp Guide Singapore 2
programme.desc: From an exciting jungle breakfast to a magical Night Safari, Sukhmani’s experiences at the Singapore Zoo make her fall in love with wildlife.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Backpack Acre, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Acre, starting from El Jazzar mosque and Citadel fortress. Next day she travels to Mizpe Hayamim and then explores the town of Capernaum.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Czech Republic Karlovy Vary
programme.desc: Legend has it that Karlovy Vary was founded by the Czech king and Roman emperor Charles IV, who discovered a unique spring here while hunting deer one evening. This historic spa town in Czech Republic is known for the healing power of its thermal springs. Rohan explores a few of them including the Freedom and Rusalka Springs and understands their significance to the town.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Timeless Tamil Nadu Thanjavur, India
programme.desc: Alex takes a trip to Thanjavur, curious about why it has always been called “the cradle of arts”. Soon, she is lost in the magnificence of the Great Living Chola Temples, with their stunning architecture and intricate carvings, rich in symbolism. At a center for making bronze statues, she is surprised to find out how ancient is the art form. The highlight of her trip, however, is a visit to a workshop for making musical instruments, where she is treated to an impromptu performance.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Quest Naila 2, India
programme.desc: The sheer ingenuity and artistry of Rajasthani cuisine is an enduring testament to the skill and grim determination of the people who have made their homes in this largely arid land. Alex finds out that this applies to the imperial cuisine of the state as well, when she meets Trivikram and learns from him how to prepare a traditional meat dish, that was made using meat leftovers.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 10 Days Estonia Setomaa
programme.desc: Marco and Erica soak in the vitality of the student town, Tartu, and experience its eccentricities at the Leaning House and the AHHAA Science Centre. Following this, they visit Obinista, the cultural centre of Setomaa, where the Seto community introduces them to the traditional ways of dressing, singing and dancing. They also indulge in a traditional smoke sauna at nearby Võromaa.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Great World Hotels One & Only Reethi Rah 1
programme.desc: From swimming in the ocean to relishing a traditional Maldivian lobster curry, Kim experiences the true meaning of joie de vivre at Reethi Rah.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Backpack Nazareth, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina is in Tiberias, known for its natural hot springs, here she visits the Sea of Galilee. In Nezareth she visits the cave of Mary, ending with Via Dolorosa in Jerusalem.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xplore Czech Republic Cesky Krumlov
programme.desc: Situated on the banks of the Vltava river, Český Krumlov is a fine example of a European medieval town. Rohan witnesses the Gothic, Renaissance and Baroque elements of the stunning State Castle, which dominates the city. He also finds out about the unconventional life and work of the world-famous painter, whose art was once inspired by this fairytale town in mysterious ways.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Timeless Tamil Nadu Nilgiris, India
programme.desc: Ooty has been known to charm visitors ever since British officers used to go there to escape the infamous Indian summer. Sipping tea at the tiered tea plantations, strolling by serene lakes and gushing waterfalls, gawking at gentle deer and majestic elephants at Mudumalai National Park, Alex loses herself in the breathtaking natural beauty of this retreat nestled in the Nilgiri hills.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Quest Karni Fort, India
programme.desc: After finding his grandparents’ handwritten recipes, Vikramaditya Sodawas, the owner of Karni Fort, decided to revive his family’s prized recipes.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Estonia Sooma National Park
programme.desc: Embracing Estonia’s largest area of swamps, meadows and waterside forests, Soomaa National Park is the second largest national park in the country. While trying out bog walking and camping over here, Marco and Erica experience what is known as the “fifth season” in Estonia, the season of floods. They also explore Tallinn’s history with espionage, and go on to soak in the romance at its Christmas Market.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels One & Only Reethi Rah 2
programme.desc: Located in the North Malé Atoll of Maldives, the Reethi Rah resort is the perfect combination of island life mixed with world-class luxury.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Backpack Jerusalem, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina in Jerusalem, takes a guided tour of City of David and visits Western Wall, learning about its significance. Ending with Cardo and Mahane Yehuda Markets.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Xplore Czech Republic Prague
programme.desc: With unparalleled old-world charm, Prague is the answer of Czech Republic to Paris. It is considered one of the most beautiful cities in the world. Rohan Patoley learns about the history and architecture of this spellbinding city at sights such as the majestic Prague castle, Wenceslas square and a Jewish cemetery. But the best experience he has in Prague is when he gets to interact with the Prince of Lobkowicz Palace.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Timeless Tamil Nadu Kodaikanal, India
programme.desc: Kodaikanal - the name means “The Gift of the Forest”. True to its name, the cozy hill station nestled in Tamil Nadu’s Palani Hills is captivating with its verdant hills, cascading waterfalls, and postcard-perfect lakes. Alex is truly astonished, however, when she stumbles onto an observatory here that has been tracking solar activity for around 115 years!

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Quest Karni Fort & Fort Begu, India
programme.desc: Alex visits Karni Fort and Fort Begu in Rajasthan, where she unearths some prized dishes of the nobilities.

programme.title: Bliss
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Bliss Cappadocia Turkey
programme.desc: From hot air balloon rides to visiting cave houses, Kirsty explores the rich geological, cultural and historical heritage of beautiful Cappadocia.

programme.title: Best From The Rest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Best From The Rest Hong Kong Top Sees
programme.desc: While Hong Kong may be a haven for social media brags, a closer look at some of its most iconic attractions exposes its authentic richness.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 World Spas Mines Wellness, Thailand (ENG)
programme.desc: Shirodhara is a traditional Ayurvedic oil drip treatment that popular world traveler, Jamie Srubis tries at the Mines Wellness Resort in Malaysia. Following this, she tries other treatments such as Urut Melayu, a full body massage which derives its technique from a traditional Malay martial art, and Acupuncture and Moxibustion, the two oldest treatments of Traditional Chinese Medicine.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Timeless Tamil Nadu Madurai, India
programme.desc: During her travels across Tamil Nadu, Alex finally reaches one of India’s most famous pilgrimage sites – Madurai. She pays her respects at the nerve center of the city – the Meenakshi Amman Temple. Her exploration of Madurai reveals to her, however, that there is another, rather delightful side to this revered city.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 Backpack Eilat, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Ein Gedi oasis and Masada plateau on her way to Eilat, where she visits the beaches, Red Canyon and Wadi Shani.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Quest Karni Fort & Fort Begu, India
programme.desc: Alex visits Karni Fort and Fort Begu in Rajasthan, where she unearths some prized dishes of the nobilities.

programme.title: Bliss
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Bliss Cappadocia Turkey
programme.desc: From hot air balloon rides to visiting cave houses, Kirsty explores the rich geological, cultural and historical heritage of beautiful Cappadocia.

programme.title: Best From The Rest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Best From The Rest Hong Kong Top Sees
programme.desc: While Hong Kong may be a haven for social media brags, a closer look at some of its most iconic attractions exposes its authentic richness.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 World Spas Mines Wellness, Thailand (ENG)
programme.desc: Shirodhara is a traditional Ayurvedic oil drip treatment that popular world traveler, Jamie Srubis tries at the Mines Wellness Resort in Malaysia. Following this, she tries other treatments such as Urut Melayu, a full body massage which derives its technique from a traditional Malay martial art, and Acupuncture and Moxibustion, the two oldest treatments of Traditional Chinese Medicine.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Timeless Tamil Nadu Madurai, India
programme.desc: During her travels across Tamil Nadu, Alex finally reaches one of India’s most famous pilgrimage sites – Madurai. She pays her respects at the nerve center of the city – the Meenakshi Amman Temple. Her exploration of Madurai reveals to her, however, that there is another, rather delightful side to this revered city.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 Backpack Eilat, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Ein Gedi oasis and Masada plateau on her way to Eilat, where she visits the beaches, Red Canyon and Wadi Shani.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeenshire (ENG)
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Backpack Majdanpek, Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bhutan Paro
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Scotland Inverness (ENG)
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Backpack Nis, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bhutan Thimpu
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Food Fact Fun Gouda, Netherlands
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 10 Days Scotland Isle Of Skye (ENG)
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Backpack Resavsk Pecina, Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 With Love From Mauritius Ep 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bhutan Phobjikha
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 World Spas Kempenki, Jordan (ENG)
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Food Fact Fun Dubai 1
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 City Breaks Innsbruck, Austria
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Backpack Sjenica, Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 With Love From Mauritius Ep 2
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 XP Guide Copenhagen, Denmark
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Unwind Hotel Oriole, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Food Fact Fun Dubai 2
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Backpack Belgrade, Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeenshire (ENG)
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Backpack Majdanpek, Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bhutan Paro
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Scotland Inverness (ENG)
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Backpack Nis, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bhutan Thimpu
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Food Fact Fun Gouda, Netherlands
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 10 Days Scotland Isle Of Skye (ENG)
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Backpack Resavsk Pecina, Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 With Love From Mauritius Ep 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bhutan Phobjikha
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 World Spas Kempenki, Jordan (ENG)
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Food Fact Fun Dubai 1
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 City Breaks Innsbruck, Austria
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Backpack Sjenica, Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 With Love From Mauritius Ep 2
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 XP Guide Copenhagen, Denmark
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: A rare look behind the scenes at some of the planet's most exclusive factories.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Maserati's return to Italian motoring with a sportier model called the Ghibli.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Supercars shows you two of the most exciting convertibles in the world with a combined power of more than 1000 hp. The Aston Martin V12 Vantage S Roadster is probably the most amazing export from the UK.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Cayman GT4 combines the best elements that a Porsche can bring to you: 3.8 liter six-cylinder boxer engine from the 911 Carrera S, chassis, brake system and aerodynamics from the GT3 and six-gear transmission.

programme.title: Rolls-Royce Dawn Convertible
programme.desc: Almost silently, it glides through the night; in front of the driver, 12 smoothly running cylinders are at work, with a power reserve that seems inexhaustible; the Rolls Royce Dawn is a convertible for connoisseurs.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Track Masters
programme.desc: Following the progress of driver Uwe Nittle, as he gets ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Track Masters
programme.desc: A look at the RCN Challenge: The BMW Driving Experience and the Devils Diner.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Track Masters
programme.desc: Now that the 24-hour race is over we have left the Nuerburgring and moved to Bueren, Germany, where Raeder Sport is based. Famous for really fast front-wheel drives, it provides a lot of horsepower down on the track.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Track Masters
programme.desc: The track at Nuerburgring is used for bike riding and running.

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports
programme.desc: Capping the international calendar, the Individual World Championship delivers in its finale.

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports
programme.desc: The U.S.'s Erin LaVoie defends her title at the International Women's Cup in Klingenthal, Germany.

programme.title: Perfect Ride

programme.desc: Smart offers its iconic city car with a convertible option; the Mini cabriolet is bigger and provides room for four people; when it comes to roadster feeling, the Mazda MX-5 is on top of the list.

programme.desc: Inside Surfing tells the stories about the people, places and things that make surfing so special. Is it a sport, an art form or a lifestyle, or all three at the same time? The series provides a look behind the scenes of surfing with all its facets.

programme.title: Meet Connor Herson
programme.desc: Connor Herson pushes the limits of what is possible on the rock. But his latest and greatest challenge? Balancing a life climbing cutting edge ascents with his studies at Stanford.

programme.title: Copa Kitley GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup 2024 – Cauipe (BRA) – Overall Highlights
programme.desc: The Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour 2024 will host the second stop of the freestyle discipline in Cauipe in north-eastern Brazil. The Copa Kitley GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup offers intense competitions in the shallow waters.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2024 #45: Freestyle Pro Tour 2024
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesports and the Freestyle Pro Tour 2024! Get ready to witness the world’s best freestylers perform jaw-dropping tricks and intense competition on the water. Let the battle for the title begin - it’s time for freestyle action!

programme.title: iQFOiL U23 World Championships - Live delayed Part 2
programme.desc: Portimão, Portugal, welcomed the world's best windsurfers to the iQFOiL U23 World Championships from September 6 to 13, 2025. The venue is known for its Atlantic winds, waves, and extreme racing conditions that challenge even the most experienced competitors

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 – Ibiraquera (BRA) – Overall Highlights
programme.desc: Ibiraquera is the venue for the GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024, where the world's best wingfoilers will meet. With its constant winds and breathtaking coastline, this Brazilian hotspot provides the perfect backdrop for exciting races.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Engadinsnow
programme.desc: ENGADINSNOW is one of the longest-running freeride competitions in the Alps. Apart from its long tradition, this event classic has always been all about innovation.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 LAAX OPEN 2021 - Slopestyle & Halfpipe World Cup - News
programme.desc: The LAAX OPEN 2021 takes place from 19-23 January 2021, kicking off the FIS Snowboard World Cup Tour 20/21 in the disciplines Slopestyle and Halfpipe and is endowed with 140,000 CHF prize money.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Bike2Boat
programme.desc: In the Bike 2 Boat adventurewe set off on a climate-neutral journey through the Alps together with four kayakers. We will accompany them on their search for extraordinary kayak spots and unforgettable experiences.

programme.title: FIA Championship Middle East - Saudi Baja Hall
programme.desc: The Saudi Baja is an important event in the FIA Middle East Baja Cup series. It takes place from January 30 to February 1, 2025 and serves as the opening round of the FIA World Cup for Cross-Country Bajas and the FIM Bajas World Cup.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 WOF 2025 #25: Golden Roof Challenge - Innsbruck (AUT)
programme.desc: On June 7, the Golden Roof Challenge celebrated its 21st edition in the heart of Innsbruck, Austria. Twenty top international pole vault and long jump athletes compete for crucial world ranking points on “The FlySwat”

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 WOF 2025 #26: Formula Kite European Championships 2025
programme.desc: We take a look at the Formula Kite European Championships 2025 - the pinnacle of high-speed sailing and cutting-edge kiteboard racing! The fastest kitefoil athletes in the world have gathered to compete against the wind and the water

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 WOF 2025 #27: Epic Series - 4 Islands
programme.desc: The 4Islands Epic is a legendary stage race as part of the Epic Series, which takes place on the Croatian islands of the Kvarner region - Lošinj, Cres, Krk and occasionally Rab - and offers around 260 km and 5,600 vertical meters over five days (prologue + four stages).

programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Freeride World Tour 2023 - stop #1 - Baqueira Beret (ESP)
programme.desc: The 2023 Freeride World Tour kicks off in January in its 16th season – as usual with the best freeriders all over the globe! The first stop of the tour takes place in Baqueira Beret.

programme.title: Defender GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 – Sylt (GER) – Overall Highlights
programme.desc: Stopover of the kite surfing discipline on the Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour in Sylt, Germany. The Defender GKA Kite World Cup Sylt is held in two disciplines - Kite-Surf and Hydrofoil Big Air.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 – Sal (CPV) – Rider Profile | Elena Moreno
programme.desc: Cape Verde is hosting the GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024, bringing together the best kitesurfers in the world like Elena Moreno. From breathtaking freestyle tricks to impressive racing moments, her determination and talent are on display.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 - Sal (CPV)
programme.desc: Cape Verde hosts the GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024, bringing together the world’s best kite-surfers. Athletes from around the globe compete for the title, showcasing impressive skills in wave-riding and strapless freestyle.

programme.title: Open Faces 2025 - YETI Freeride Junior World Championships Kappl/Paznaun - LIVE Part 2
programme.desc: Open Faces 2025 - YETI Freeride Junior World Championships Kappl/Paznaun - LIVE Part 2

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _05_ Queen _ King of the Court
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 WOF 2023 #41: Vanora ENGADINWIND by Dakine 2023
programme.desc: Der VANORA ENGADINWIND by Dakine kehrt 2023 mit viel spannender Windsurf-Action auf dem Silvaplanasee in der Schweiz zurück. Der ENGADINWIND ist auch Gastgeber der ersten iQ FOiL U21 Weltmeisterschaft, die für das olympische Programm in Paris 2024 ausgewählt wurde.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2023 #42: WES E-Bike World Series #5 & World Rookie Tour Finals
programme.desc: In der heutigen Episode machen wir einen Städtetrip: Zuerst schauen wir bei der WES E-Bike World Series in Bielstein, Deutschland, vorbei und dann geht's weiter zum Finale der World Rookie Tour und ihren jungen Skatetalente in Innbruck.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 WOF 2023 #43: GKA Kitesurfing World Tour The Stars of Freestyle
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge werden wir die GKA Kitesurfing World Tour 2023 besuchen. Die Hälfte der Kitesurfing-Freestyle-Saison ist bereits vorbei und das ist ein guter Grund, die vergangenen Events und den aktuellen Stand der Athleten zu analysieren.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 WOF 2023 #44: World Rowing Beach Sprint Finals 2023
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge haben wir ein besonderes Format der World Rowing Tour. In Barletta, Italien, finden die Beach Sprint Finals von 2023 statt. Auf dem Mittelmeer kämpfen die Athleten um den Titel des diesjährigen Champions. Schauen wir mal rein!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 WOF 2024 #36: FIA Karting European Championship - Kristianstad (SWE)
programme.desc: FIA Karting European ChampionshipsThis time we are in Sweden to have a look at a rather unusual motorsport event. Almost every motorsport pilot has started his carrer in a Kart. Let´s see how europe´s new pilot generation is doing on the scandinavian course.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 WOF 2024 #37: GKA Kitesurf Worldtour Sylt Highlights
programme.desc: GKA Kitesurf Worldtour Sylt Highlights - Sylt (GER)Welcome to World of Freesports and the beautiful beaches of Sylt, the most northern part of Germany, where the Big Air Riders of the GKA are off for a battle. Let´s check out this spectaculare water event!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 WOF 2024 #38: Ötztal Cycle Marathon (AUT)
programme.desc: The Ötztal Cycle Marathon 2024 in Austria, taking place on the 1st of September, is the most challenging cycling marathon in the Alps, offering a captivating mix of valley and high alpine terrain. The course spans 227 kilometers and over 4,000 participants.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018 - Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes -
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: FIA World Championship – Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge - Daily Highlights Stage #01
programme.desc: The FIA World Championship - Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge 2025 is an exciting motorsport event in the breathtaking desert of the United Arab Emirates. A must for all fans of first-class off-road racing.

programme.desc: The FIA World Championship - Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge 2025 is an exciting motorsport event in the breathtaking desert of the United Arab Emirates. A must for all fans of first-class off-road racing.

programme.desc: The FIA World Championship - Abu Dhabi Desert Challenge 2025 is an exciting motorsport event in the breathtaking desert of the United Arab Emirates. A must for all fans of first-class off-road racing.

programme.desc: The 2023 Freeride World Tour kicks off in January in its 16th season – as usual with the best freeriders all over the globe! The first stop of the tour takes place in Baqueira Beret.
